scenarios.description: Default htmlParser settings are case-insensitive so uppercase tags are folded and not selectable
scenarios.precondition: Parser obtained via Parser.htmlParser() with default ParseSettings
scenarios.expectedResult: Document.select("TAG") returns size 0, lowercase tag found instead

scenarios.description: Default xmlParser settings are case-sensitive so uppercase tags are preserved and selectable
scenarios.precondition: Parser obtained via Parser.xmlParser() with default ParseSettings
scenarios.expectedResult: Document.select("TAG") returns size 1, uppercase tag preserved
pseudocode: // verify lowercase query returns nothing when case-sensitive
